title: 'Bob & Tom Show' creator, co-host Bob Kevoian dies at 75
summary: Bob Kevoian retired from the nationally syndicated show in 2015 after 32 years hosting alongside Tom Griswold.

title: Former TV anchor Brian Williams to host podcast series on Netflix
summary: The podcast will feature conversations with "some of the most interesting figures shaping popular culture today," including actors, writers, musicians and more.

title: Denver looks to buy, redevelop state office building site in Cap Hill
summary: It would be the first affordable housing project using Vibrant Denver Bond dollars.

title: New program brings Boulder chefs into homeless shelter kitchen
summary: A Boulder nonprofit is pairing local chefs with its homeless shelter kitchen, challenging them to cook for 180 residents using only donated ingredients on hand.

title: With cuts coming to Proposition 123, Colorado’s budget crisis is about to make its housing crisis worse
Rockies improve to .500 on the season following win over Astros
summary: The Rockies swept the Astros with their 9-1 win Wednesday, their first sweep at home since May 2024 against the Rangers.

title: Denver’s new housing head is the mayor’s old homelessness adviser
summary: Cole Chandler has been the face of the mayor’s homelessness strategy — and at times a punching bag for Johnston's critics.
